summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TradeLife theme system implementation. All 10 feature requirements verified successfully with no issues found.
passed_tests: Default theme is 'commercial' with blue accent (#3b82f6)
Theme switching to 'molten' changes accent to orange (#f97316)
Theme switching to 'remembrance' changes accent to red (#dc2626)
All 3 themes define complete set of 13 CSS variables
ThemeProvider component wraps children in div with theme class
Zustand store theme state persistence working correctly
Layout structure (3-column grid) remains identical across all themes
No glow, blur, or particle effects found in any theme
Dashboard loads at /dashboard with all content visible
Theme class changes affect only colors, not layout or spacing
Interactive elements (buttons, hover states) work across all themes
All 8 major layout components present and functional

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All theme system features working perfectly
